rulings.Case Title: MARTIN MCNERNEY DEVELOPMENT, INC. VS. MOASIS GLOBAL LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, November 07, 2016, Line 5. DEFENDANT MOASIS GLOBAL CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that Plaintiff improperly included the Late Payment Interest in the "3 Day Notice" as this amount is due per Master Lease 18.6 and 1.1, incorporated into the Sublease and assumed by the Sublessee under paragraph 1 of the Sublease. Paragraph 3(b) of the Sublease does not contradict or supersede paragraphs 18.6 and 1.1 (as opposed to paragraph 4.2 of Master Lease). "Except as to provisions which are specifically contradicted or superseded by the Sublease, each and every term, condition and covenant contained in the Master Lease is incorporated by reference into this Sublease as if fully set forth herein. Subleasee hereby assumes and agrees to perform each and every term, condition and covenant which is an obligation of Lessee under the Master Lease with respect to the Subleased Space and Sublessor shall have each of the right and remedies of the master Landlord under the Master Lease with respect to the Subleased Space." (Sublease, paragraph 1). Moving party failed to show that paragraphs 18.6 and 1.1. of the Master Lease are not applicable with respect to the Subleased Space. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DIAMOND VIEW APARTMENTS VS. ELIJAH BELCHER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, November 07, 2016, Line 6. Demurrer is sustained with 5-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach a complete copy of the parties' agreement. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 626 JACKSON STREET LLC VS. PAUL NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, November 07, 2016, Line 9. DEFENDANT PAUL NATHAN, THE GREAT STAR THEATER, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Complaint sufficiently alleges that Montgomery is a property defendant as an occupant of the premises. Issues of fact cannot be properly raised on demurrer. =(501/AJR)
